message:
feat(runtime): Add reusable type helpers and missing stdlib exports

- Add ElementType comptime helper for safe element type extraction
  from arrays/slices without indexing (handles empty arrays safely)
- Add isIterable helper to check if type has extractable element type
- Add os.path.normcase for path case normalization (Unix/Windows)
- Add os.path.realpath for symlink resolution
- Add os.path.commonprefix for finding common path prefix
- Add sys.exception() for current exception (Python 3.11+)
- Add sys.exc_info() for exception info tuple

These are universal fixes that apply across all test groups.
